title: helichrysum uhligii
intro: Helichrysum uhligii, also known as the mountain silver daisy or Uhlig's helichrysum, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to the tropical highlands of New Guinea. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum uhligii include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and even aid in the healing of wounds and bruises. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum uhligii can be consumed as teas, infused in oils, or taken in capsule form, making it an accessible and versatile remedy for various health concerns.
